evals.prompt: Quantify urban expansion between 2015 and 2025 from Landsat.
expected_behavior: Checks co-registration, same processing level, matched season, intersected cloud masks
Builds a transition matrix and screens impossible transitions
Reports error-adjusted area estimates with confidence intervals (Olofsson), not raw pixel counts

evals.prompt: Difference these two NDVI images and map the change.
expected_behavior: Chooses a defensible threshold (k·sigma or Otsu) shown on the histogram
Reports sensitivity at k±0.5 and flags fragile detections

evals.prompt: Compare this May scene to this September scene to find deforestation.
expected_behavior: Flags the phenology impostor (detecting summer, not deforestation)
Proposes matched-season pairs, composites, or time-series methods

evals.prompt: Audit this two-date change map, its confusion matrices, reference sample, and reported hectares before publication.
expected_behavior: Checks that the reference sample supports change-class accuracy and area estimation
Recomputes error-adjusted areas and confidence intervals from the stratified sample
Flags raw mapped pixel area as a biased final estimate when classification error is material

evals.prompt: I have an irregular eight-year vegetation-index series and need to know when the landscape changed, but seasonal behavior is strong.
expected_behavior: Clarifies whether abrupt breaks, gradual trends, or class transitions define change
Uses seasonal or time-series break methods rather than arbitrary two-date differencing

evals.prompt: Classify land cover in one cloud-masked Sentinel-2 composite; there is no second date or temporal comparison.
expected_behavior: Routes to remote-sensing-analysis for a single-date classification workflow
Does not invent a change-detection stage without a temporal comparison

evals.prompt: Atmospherically correct and cloud-mask this single Landsat scene so it is ready for later analysis.
expected_behavior: Routes to remote-sensing-analysis for single-scene preprocessing
Does not activate change-detection when no change question is present
